dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6119 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 202 South Chestnut Avenue in Marshfield, Wisconsin, as the “Army Corporal Gordon Gordy Richard Schmoll Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Tiffany (for himself, Mr. Steil, Mr. Van Orden, Ms. Moore of Wisconsin, Mr. Fitzgerald, Mr. Grothman, and Mr. Wied) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 202 South Chestnut Avenue in Marshfield, Wisconsin, as the Army Corporal Gordon Gordy Richard Schmoll Post Office Building.

section.header: Army Corporal Gordon Gordy Richard Schmoll Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 202 South Chestnut Avenue in Marshfield, Wisconsin, shall be known and designated as the Army Corporal Gordon Gordy Richard Schmoll Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Army Corporal Gordon Gordy Richard Schmoll Post Office Building.
